creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: wxs->freebsd-ports-bugs

On second thought, this patch is massive and should probably not be 
committed as is.  It's better to let the maintainers update to use the 
new method during the normal course of maintaining their ports. 

As such I'm giving this back to the pool in case anyone else feels more 
comfortable about doing this.  I'm not opposed to closing it either.
